points.text: Fever is a frequent symptom of COVID‑19. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Cough (or coughing) commonly occurs in COVID‑19 infection. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Loss of smell (anosmia) is a typical COVID‑19 symptom. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Loss of taste (ageusia) often accompanies COVID‑19. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Fatigue is commonly reported by COVID‑19 patients. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Breathing difficulties may appear, especially in moderate to severe cases. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Headaches can be a less common but noted symptom. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Nasal congestion and runny nose are reported symptoms. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Muscle pain (myalgia) is among the symptoms. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Sore throat can be a symptom of COVID‑19. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Congestion, runny nose, or sore throat (common cold‑like symptoms) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Dry cough [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Shortness of breath [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Loss of taste or smell [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Extreme fatigue (tiredness) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Fever or chills [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Headaches and body or muscle aches [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Fever is one of the most common COVID-19 symptoms.
Cough is a frequent symptom of COVID-19 infection.
Tiredness (fatigue) is commonly reported in COVID-19 cases.
